subjects.description: orange and yellow hot air balloon ascending over a verdant valley
subjects.appearance_details: large rounded envelope painted in vibrant orange and yellow panels, woven basket suspended below, smooth upward lift
subjects.relationship: main aerial subject rising above the valley landscape
subjects.location: above a green valley with stream, trees, rolling hills, and distant mountains
subjects.relative_size: large in the sky but small compared with the broad valley and mountains
subjects.orientation: vertical ascent with basket centered beneath the envelope
subjects.action: ascends slowly and gracefully into the sky
subjects.state_changes: balloon rises higher, reflection shifts in the stream, valley floor recedes beneath it
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: taut woven fabric panels with warm color and subtle seam texture

background_setting: A lush valley filled with trees, a winding stream in the foreground, rolling hills, distant mountains, and clear sunlight reflecting the balloon colors in the water.

lighting.conditions: Clear warm daylight with crisp highlights on the balloon fabric, sparkling stream reflections, and soft shadows across the valley.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Clear warm daylight with crisp highlights on the balloon fabric, sparkling stream reflections, and soft shadows across the valley.

aesthetics.composition: High definition scenic travel imagery, peaceful aerial motion, vivid orange and yellow against deep green, expansive depth.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: High definition scenic travel imagery, peaceful aerial motion, vivid orange and yellow against deep green, expansive depth.

cinematography.camera_motion: Wide cinematic landscape shot with a slow upward tilt and subtle drone like rise to keep the balloon centered above the valley.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Photorealistic high definition text to video.
artistic_style: Serene landscape realism with vibrant color and graceful aerial composition.
context: A hot air balloon lifts off over a beautiful green valley, turning the quiet landscape into a calm aerial spectacle.

actions.description: The orange and yellow balloon floats just above the valley, its color reflected in the stream below.
It rises steadily while treetops and rolling hills drop lower in the frame.
The balloon ascends against distant mountains, appearing calm and majestic in the open sky.

segments.description: Establish the balloon above the stream and lush valley floor.
segments.key_changes: Balloon begins visible ascent, water reflection trembles softly.
segments.camera: Wide valley shot from a slightly elevated viewpoint.

segments.description: Track the graceful rise over trees and rolling hills.
segments.key_changes: Altitude increases, valley details recede, balloon remains central.
segments.camera: Slow upward pan with steady framing.

segments.description: Frame the balloon against distant mountains and open sky.
segments.key_changes: Balloon clears more of the valley, color contrast strengthens against the horizon.
segments.camera: Gentle drone like lift and hold.

temporal_caption: A vibrant orange and yellow hot air balloon rises slowly over a green valley with a stream, hills, and distant mountains.
audio_description: Soft wind, distant birds, faint burner whoosh, and gentle stream ambience below.
